name: Zendesk
description: Zendesk is a leading customer service platform used by thousands of businesses worldwide. It provides a unified agent workspace, ticketing, help centre, live chat, and AI-powered automation for support teams.
use_cases: Your support team handles thousands of tickets per month across email, chat, and social and needs intelligent routing and SLA management
You want a self-service knowledge base that deflects tickets automatically using AI-powered answers before an agent gets involved
Your organisation needs enterprise-grade workforce management — scheduling, QA scoring, and agent performance tracking — inside the support platform
You're scaling a B2B support operation where customers need a dedicated portal, custom ticket views, and HIPAA-compliant handling
